recommendations.title: The Man Who Cried
recommendations.overview: A young refugee travels from Russia to America in search of her lost father and falls in love with a gypsy horseman.

recommendations.title: Orlando
recommendations.overview: England, 1600. Queen Elizabeth I promises Orlando, a young nobleman obsessed with poetry, that she will grant him land and fortune if he agrees to satisfy a very particular request.

recommendations.title: Ginger & Rosa
recommendations.overview: A look at the lives of two teenage girls - inseparable friends Ginger and Rosa -- growing up in 1960s London as the Cuban Missile Crisis looms, and the pivotal event the comes to redefine their relationship.

recommendations.title: Decalogue I
recommendations.overview: Krzysztof, a semantics professor and computer hobbyist, is raising his young son, Paweł, to look to science for answers, while Irena, Paweł’s aunt, lives a life rooted in faith. Over the course of one day, both adults are forced to question their bel

recommendations.title: Dance of the Forty One
recommendations.overview: Mexico City, November 1901. The police raid a private home where a secret party is being held. Among those attending is the son-in-law of President Porfirio Díaz.

recommendations.title: In Cold Blood
recommendations.overview: After a botched robbery results in the brutal murder of a rural family, two drifters elude police, in the end coming to terms with their own mortality and the repercussions of their vile atrocity.

recommendations.title: Malcolm & Marie
recommendations.overview: As a filmmaker and his girlfriend return home from his movie premiere, smoldering tensions and painful revelations push them toward a romantic reckoning.

recommendations.title: Nothing to Hide
recommendations.overview: To spice up a dinner party, old friends agree to share every private message that pops up on their phones -- with disastrous results.

recommendations.title: Pegasus
recommendations.overview: Zhang Chi, a hubris and dominating six-time racing champion, falls from grace following a crisis. After a five-year suspension from the motorsport, the now single-father to a six-year-old boy throws down the gauntlet once again.

recommendations.title: Meus 15 Anos: Filme
recommendations.overview: A shy student suddenly becomes the center of attention when she wins a huge birthday party that she never asked for.
